description: Opens given component or first component of given component type on specified info panel.
examples:
<sqf>
// opens slingload assistant on right panel
private _result = setInfoPanel ["VehicleSystemsDisplayManagerComponentRight", "SlingLoadDisplayComponent"];
if (!_result) then { hint "could not open the slingload assistant, sorry" };
</sqf>
name: setInfoPanel

ret.desc: [[true]] if panel was successfully opened, [[false]] otherwise (e.g. opening GPS on player without GPS item or setting panel to vehicle that doesn't have such capability configured)
